title: Willowfen Press KDP picture-book preflight: audit supplied interior + cover .indd/PDF against KDP print specs and emit a marked-up preflight report
one_line_ask: Audit Willowfen Press's supplied 32-page KDP picture-book interior .indd, its exported interior PDF, and the wraparound cover PDF against the KDP spec sheet — checking trim, bleed, margins, spine width, image resolution and caption overset — and emit a marked-up preflight report plus proof renders that says whether the files will pass KDP preflight.

assets.name: pip_interior_template.indd
assets.note: Client-provided .indd template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).

assets.name: pip_interior_export.pdf
assets.qc_note: Content regenerated after QC (32-page 'Pip & the Paper Moon' interior with per-page captions + two deliberate defects: page 17 ~180 DPI, page 24 caption overset). Final acceptance: original .pdf was plain UTF-8 text (not a real PDF) so it could not be KDP-preflighted; re-emitted as a genuine %PDF-1.4 with 33 pages (1 header proof + 32 story pages), each 8.75x11.25 in = 8.5x11 trim + 0.125 in bleed all around, captions burned in, page-24 caption rendered inside an undersized frame so it visibly oversets/clips, page-17 marked ~180 DPI. Pre-fix text preserved in assets/_pretext_backup/.

assets.name: pip_cover_wrap.pdf
assets.qc_note: Final acceptance: original .pdf was plain text (not a real PDF). Re-emitted as a genuine %PDF-1.4 wraparound cover sized to the real sheet geometry 17.3225 x 11.25 in (back 8.5 | spine 0.0725 | front 8.5 + 0.125 bleed all around), back/spine/front panels drawn with trim guides, title 'Pip & the Paper Moon' + WILLOWFEN PRESS wordmark on the front, and the deliberate spine defect (title overruns the ~0.0725 in spine into the front live area). Full layout spec preserved on page 2. Pre-fix text in assets/_pretext_backup/.

assets.name: pip_captions.csv
assets.qc_note: Deterministically rebuilt after QC: original had unquoted commas breaking 25/32 rows under a strict CSV parser. Now correctly QUOTE_MINIMAL-quoted, 32 rows, page-24 long caption (178 chars) preserved for the overset check.

assets.name: kdp_spec_sheet.pdf
assets.qc_note: Content regenerated after QC (clean spec table with all target numbers). Final acceptance: original .pdf was plain Markdown text (not a real PDF); re-emitted as a genuine %PDF-1.4 one-page 8.5x11 in reference sheet with the parameters rendered as a real labeled table. Pre-fix text in assets/_pretext_backup/.
